productDisplayName: Wills Classic Men White Striped Shirt
description: Style note Classic Wills shirt made of pure cotton, crafted with the label's best yarn. Keep your workwear composition original with this striped staple. Wear it with formal trousers, brogues and an understated belt. Product Details White and blue striped shirt, has short sleeves, spread collar, full buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem  Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
